_comment_mining: Number of CPU threads - RPi5 has 4 cores. Use 2 for low power/24-7 operation, 4 for maximum performance
_comment_priority: Process priority (0-20, higher = lower priority). Use 19 for 24/7 operation (lowest priority), 0 for maximum performance
_comment_mode: Mining mode. 'solo' = own local bitcoind node via RPC (full sovereignty, needs full blockchain sync). 'pool' = SoloPool.org via Stratum (no local node, trustless coinbase). Override with .env MINING_MODE.
_comment_pool: Used only when mode='pool'. provider: 'solopool' (fixed share diff, region+tier) or 'ckpool' (CKPool solo, vardiff — auto-adapts to hashrate, shows stats for weak miners). region: eu|us (ckpool also asia/oceania) — picks the SoloPool location or the CKPool regional sibling (eu=eusolo, us=solo, asia=sgsolo, oceania=ausolo). tier (solopool only): low|mid|high -> 250K/1M/10M (port 8005/7005/9005); for RPi5 use 'low'. worker_id: label for pool stats. Reward address comes from .env BITCOIN_MINING_ADDRESS.
_comment_bitcoind: Used only when mode='solo'. These will be overridden by .env values (BITCOIN_RPC_USER and BITCOIN_RPC_PASSWORD)
_comment_coinbase: Mining address and message. Address will be overridden by .env BITCOIN_MINING_ADDRESS
_comment_monitoring: Temperature thresholds in Celsius for warnings and critical alerts
_comment_telegram: Telegram notifications interval in minutes (30 = every 30 minutes). Set to 0 to disable
